sources_note: 36Kr / TechTimes / AI Marketers / B2The7 / Campaign Asia / Digiday / Flypost Marketing / GoodMorning Co. / Yahoo Finance / PR Newswire / super-apps.ai / WSD Social / Fortune / ContentGrip / Common Thread Co. 等15+ 資訊來源；由 Mia 每朝自動整理精選，讀者宜自行核實原文連結。
sections: AI 大模型 & 市場動態
廣告平台 & 行銷科技
行業影響 & 品牌案例

items.title: WAIC 2026 上海閉幕：算力、應用、治理三大信號全球矚目
items.summary: 上海 WAIC 2026（7月17-20日）以三大信號收尾：算力基建提速、逾 300 款 AI 產品落地應用、AI 治理框架同步推進，是今年全球 AI 生態最集中展示。
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態
items.why: 中國 AI 治理框架正在成形，影響在華 AI 工具合規部署節奏。
items.title_en: WAIC 2026 Shanghai wraps: compute, applications, governance — three signals the world is watching
items.summary_en: Shanghai's WAIC 2026 (Jul 17–20) closed on three signals: faster compute infrastructure, 300+ AI products going live, and AI-governance frameworks advancing in step — the year's most concentrated showcase of the global AI ecosystem.
items.why_en: China's AI-governance framework is taking shape — it shapes the compliance pace for deploying AI tools there.

items.title: Gemini 3.5 Pro 再延期：全面重建後仍未正式上線
items.summary: 截至 7月19日，Google Gemini 3.5 Pro 仍未公開發布，原定 7月17日目標再次落空，全面重建旨在強化數學推理及 Tool-Calling（工具呼叫）能力，Flash 版本維持預設。
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態
items.why: 計劃將 Gemini Pro 納入 workflow 嘅 agency，需繼續等待正式版本上線。
items.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Pro delayed again: still not live after a full rebuild
items.summary_en: As of Jul 19, Google's Gemini 3.5 Pro is still unreleased, missing its Jul 17 target again. The full rebuild aims to strengthen math reasoning and tool-calling; the Flash version stays the default.
items.why_en: Agencies planning to put Gemini Pro into their workflow will have to keep waiting for the official release.

items.title: Anthropic 揭發：Claude Code 被中國背景黑客用於自動化網絡間諜行動
items.summary: Anthropic 確認一宗中國國家背景嘅 AI 網絡間諜行動，利用 Claude Code 自動攻擊全球基礎設施，是有記錄以來首個 AI 協調大規模網絡入侵案例。
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態
items.why: AI 工具被用於惡意攻擊，企業 AI 使用政策及安全合規需盡快評估。
items.title_en: Anthropic reveals Claude Code used by China-linked hackers for automated cyber-espionage
items.summary_en: Anthropic confirmed a China state-linked AI cyber-espionage operation that used Claude Code to automate attacks on infrastructure worldwide — the first recorded case of an AI-orchestrated large-scale intrusion.
items.why_en: With AI tools weaponized for attacks, firms should reassess AI-usage policy and security compliance soon.

items.title: Google AI Mode 廣告滲透率突破：每 3 個商業搜尋有 1 個出現 AI 廣告位
items.summary: AI Marketers 7月19日週報指 Google AI Mode（AI 增強搜尋）商業查詢廣告滲透率已達三分之一，OpenAI 同週公布進軍廣告市場計劃，AI 搜尋廣告格局加速轉型。
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態
items.why: 廣告入場方式正在改變，傳統搜尋廣告邏輯需要重新規劃。
items.title_en: Google AI Mode ad penetration breaks out: 1 in 3 commercial searches now shows an AI ad slot
items.summary_en: AI Marketers' Jul 19 weekly reports ad penetration in Google AI Mode commercial queries has hit one-third; OpenAI announced ad-market plans the same week — the AI search-ad landscape is shifting fast.
items.why_en: How ads enter the funnel is changing — traditional search-ad logic needs a rethink.

items.title: GA4 新增「AI 助手流量渠道」：直接量化 ChatGPT/Gemini 帶入幾多流量
items.summary: Google Analytics 4 七月更新新增 AI Assistant 專屬流量渠道，廣告主可直接追蹤由 ChatGPT、Gemini 等 AI 助手帶入網站嘅流量，唔再同 Referral 混在一起難以分辨。
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態
items.why: 即刻可量化 AI 流量，更準確評估 AI 搜尋對客戶網站嘅實際影響。
items.title_en: GA4 adds an 'AI Assistant' traffic channel: measure exactly how much traffic ChatGPT/Gemini send
items.summary_en: Google Analytics 4's July update adds a dedicated AI Assistant traffic channel, letting advertisers track visits driven by ChatGPT, Gemini and other AI assistants directly — no longer buried under Referral.
items.why_en: You can quantify AI traffic right away and better judge AI search's real impact on client sites.

items.title: 買 Google 廣告唔保證入圍 AI Mode 搜尋結果——官方證實
items.summary: B2The7 7月20日報告確認：買咗 Google 廣告唔代表會被 AI Mode 搜尋引用，AI Mode 引用有另一套算法邏輯，SEO 及廣告策略需分開規劃。
items.section: AI 大模型 & 市場動態
items.why: 唔能再依賴廣告預算保住 AI 搜尋曝光，需另闢 AI SEO 策略。
items.title_en: Buying Google Ads won't guarantee a spot in AI Mode results — officially confirmed
items.summary_en: A B2The7 Jul 20 report confirms buying Google Ads doesn't mean AI Mode will cite you. AI Mode citations run on separate logic, so SEO and ad strategy must be planned apart.
items.why_en: You can no longer rely on ad budget to hold AI-search visibility — a separate AI-SEO play is needed.

items.title: TikTok 購物直播禁 AI 配音：實時人聲是唯一合規選擇
items.summary: TikTok 宣布購物 LIVE（Shopping Livestream）全面禁止 AI 生成聲音及預錄音頻，強制要求真人即時解說，確保直播帶貨嘅真實性，違規帳號面臨封禁處理。
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技
items.why: 為客戶做 TikTok 帶貨嘅 agency，AI 配音工具在直播場景唔再可用。
items.title_en: TikTok bans AI voiceovers in shopping livestreams: real-time human voice is the only compliant option
items.summary_en: TikTok banned AI-generated and pre-recorded audio across Shopping LIVE, requiring live human narration to keep live-selling authentic; offending accounts face bans.
items.why_en: Agencies running TikTok live-selling for clients can no longer use AI voice tools in the livestream.

items.title: Google Ads 七月起在 AI 製作廣告素材加「AI 披露標籤」
items.summary: Google Ads 推出 AI 披露標籤政策，凡由 AI 自動生成或修改嘅廣告素材均清楚標示，係廣告透明度新規要求一部分，對所有使用 Performance Max 及 AI Max 嘅廣告主生效。
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技
items.why: 品牌 AI 廣告素材透明度要求提高，需確保質素避免客戶形象風險。
items.title_en: From July, Google Ads adds an 'AI disclosure label' to AI-made ad creative
items.summary_en: Google Ads rolled out an AI-disclosure policy: any creative generated or modified by AI is clearly labelled — part of new ad-transparency rules, in effect for all Performance Max and AI Max advertisers.
items.why_en: The transparency bar for AI ad creative is rising — keep quality up to avoid client-image risk.

items.title: Meta Ads 七月三個靜默改動，廣告報告數字已走樣
items.summary: Meta Ads Manager 七月靜默更新三項：① 關閉用戶帳戶外活動退出選項；② EU 數位服務稅費用唔顯示於 Ads Manager；③ 舊版觸及率及展示次數指標被 Media Views 取代，三項全部影響廣告報告準確性。
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技
items.why: 廣告主要立即核查 Meta 報告設定，避免誤讀數據而影響預算決策。
items.title_en: Three silent Meta Ads changes in July — your ad reports are already skewed
items.summary_en: Meta Ads Manager quietly changed three things in July: ① removed the off-account activity opt-out; ② EU digital-services-tax fees no longer shown in Ads Manager; ③ legacy Reach and Impressions replaced by Media Views — all three hit report accuracy.
items.why_en: Re-check your Meta report settings now to avoid misreading data and skewing budget calls.

items.title: Google Ads 新服務條款生效：AI 自動素材出錯責任全歸廣告主
items.summary: Google Ads 七月 1 日起更新服務條款，擴大對廣告主 URL 嘅爬取權，Performance Max（全自動出廣告方案）及 AI Max 自動生成嘅廣告素材出問題，責任全面轉移廣告主。
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技
items.why: Agency 要為客戶建立 AI 廣告素材審核 SOP，唔然合規責任由廣告主承擔。
items.title_en: New Google Ads terms in effect: advertisers bear full liability for AI auto-creative errors
items.summary_en: From Jul 1, Google Ads' updated terms expand crawling rights on advertiser URLs and shift full liability for problems with Performance Max and AI Max auto-generated creative onto the advertiser.
items.why_en: Build an AI ad-creative review SOP for clients, or the advertiser carries the compliance risk.

items.title: AI 零點擊搜尋令媒體廣告庫存收縮最多 40%
items.summary: Digiday 引述 Ozone 美英基準數據：AI 驅動嘅「零點擊搜尋」（Zero-Click Search，即 AI 直接在搜尋頁畀答案、用戶唔入網站）令 open web 媒體廣告庫存二季度收縮最多 40%。
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技
items.why: Programmatic（程序化廣告）媒體庫存收縮，需重新評估媒體採購策略。
items.title_en: AI zero-click search shrinks media ad inventory by up to 40%
items.summary_en: Digiday cites Ozone US/UK benchmarks: AI-driven 'zero-click search' (AI answers on the results page, so users don't visit sites) cut open-web media ad inventory by up to 40% in Q2.
items.why_en: Programmatic media inventory is shrinking — media-buying strategy needs re-evaluation.

items.title: LinkedIn 七月新功能：帖子觸及率分拆統計，更清晰看有機 vs 付費流量
items.summary: B2The7 7月20日報告指 LinkedIn 七月起將帖子觸及率分拆為有機觸及率及付費觸及率兩個獨立數字，讓廣告主更清楚評估內容策略及廣告投放嘅分別效益。
items.section: 廣告平台 & 行銷科技
items.why: 即刻可用這個新分拆數據優化 LinkedIn 內容策略及廣告預算分配。
items.title_en: New LinkedIn feature in July: post reach split out, clearer organic vs paid
items.summary_en: A B2The7 Jul 20 report says LinkedIn now splits post reach into separate organic and paid figures, letting advertisers judge the distinct payoff of content strategy vs ad spend.
items.why_en: Use this new split right away to optimize LinkedIn content strategy and ad-budget allocation.

items.title: 可靈 Kling 3.0 Turbo 發布：出稿前先用快速預覽，加速創意迭代
items.summary: 快手旗下 Kling AI 推出 Kling 3.0 Turbo，可由文字或圖片即生成 1–15 秒視頻預覽（480p–720p），正式渲染前先看效果，大幅縮短廣告素材創意測試周期。
items.section: 創意生產工具
items.why: 廣告 AB 測試成本大降，創意團隊可以更快迭代 visual concept 再出正片。
items.title_en: Kling 3.0 Turbo launches: fast previews before final render to speed up creative iteration
items.summary_en: Kuaishou's Kling AI released Kling 3.0 Turbo, generating 1–15s video previews (480p–720p) from text or image so you see results before final render — sharply cutting ad-creative testing cycles.
items.why_en: Ad A/B testing gets far cheaper; creative teams can iterate visual concepts faster before the final cut.

items.title: 中國 Vidu Q3 登頂全球 AI 視頻排行榜：首個原生音頻 AI 視頻模型
items.summary: 生數科技 Vidu Q3 成為全球首個整合原生音頻嘅 AI 視頻模型，在 Artificial Analysis 全球視頻排行榜超越 Sora、可靈及 Google Veo，中國 AI 視頻工具正式達到頂尖水準。
items.section: 創意生產工具
items.why: 影片廣告素材製作可考慮納入 Vidu Q3，原生音頻省去後期配音成本。
items.title_en: China's Vidu Q3 tops global AI-video rankings: first AI video model with native audio
items.summary_en: Shengshu's Vidu Q3 is the world's first AI video model with integrated native audio, beating Sora, Kling and Google Veo on the Artificial Analysis global video leaderboard — China's AI video tools reach the top tier.
items.why_en: Consider Vidu Q3 for video ad creative — native audio saves post-production dubbing costs.

items.title: Seedance 2.5 vs Kling 3.0：ByteDance 與快手兩大 AI 視頻引擎大比拼
items.summary: ByteDance Seedance 2.5（最長 30 秒原生影片，支援 50 個多模態參考輸入）VS 快手 Kling 3.0，CapCut 已整合 Seedance 2.5，兩大引擎各有強項，切合不同廣告製作需求。
items.section: 創意生產工具
items.why: CapCut 用家即刻可升級試用 Seedance 2.5，出更長嘅廣告影片素材。
items.title_en: Seedance 2.5 vs Kling 3.0: ByteDance and Kuaishou's two big AI video engines go head-to-head
items.summary_en: ByteDance Seedance 2.5 (up to 30s native video, 50 multimodal reference inputs) vs Kuaishou Kling 3.0. CapCut has integrated Seedance 2.5; each engine has its strengths for different ad-production needs.
items.why_en: CapCut users can upgrade and try Seedance 2.5 now to produce longer video ad creative.

items.title: WeChat 小微 AI 助手上線：自然語言落單、預訂、搜尋一次搞掂
items.summary: 騰訊「小微」 AI 助手七月初正式在 WeChat 上線，透過自然語言指令直接完成 Mini Program 內落單、預訂及搜尋，騰訊同時提供 10 億 Token 開發積分支援 Mini Program 接入。
items.section: 創意生產工具
items.why: WeChat 品牌 Mini Program 需評估 AI 指令相容性，及早部署可先行示範。
items.title_en: WeChat's Xiaowei AI assistant goes live: order, book and search by natural language in one go
items.summary_en: Tencent's 'Xiaowei' AI assistant launched in WeChat in early July, handling in-Mini-Program ordering, booking and search via natural-language commands; Tencent also offers 1B token dev credits to onboard Mini Programs.
items.why_en: Brand WeChat Mini Programs should test AI-command compatibility — deploying early lets you lead with a demo.

items.title: Canva AI 2.0：首個設計代理工作流，接入 Gmail 及 Slack 覆蓋全創作流程
items.summary: Canva 推出 AI 2.0，旗下首個設計專用 AI 基礎模型支援 Agentic Workflow（AI 自動完成多步設計任務），接入 Gmail、Slack 及 Zoom，覆蓋從 brief 到成品嘅完整創作流程。
items.section: 創意生產工具
items.why: Agency 可用 Canva AI 2.0 自動化重複性設計任務，慳出稿及改稿時間。
items.title_en: Canva AI 2.0: first design-agent workflow, plugs into Gmail and Slack across the whole creative flow
items.summary_en: Canva launched AI 2.0, its first design-specific AI foundation model supporting agentic workflows (AI completing multi-step design tasks), integrated with Gmail, Slack and Zoom — covering brief to finished asset.
items.why_en: Agencies can use Canva AI 2.0 to automate repetitive design tasks and save drafting and revision time.

items.title: 中國 AI 動畫初創獲 360 萬元天使輪：AI 令 2D 動畫成本降、周期短
items.summary: 奇英文化以「傳統前製 + AI 中段生成」解決 2D 動畫成本高及製作周期長嘅痛點，成功完成 360 萬元人民幣天使輪融資，驗證 AI 輔助創意製作嘅商業可行性。
items.section: 創意生產工具
items.why: AI 動畫製作模式商業可行，可考慮為客戶提案更低成本嘅動畫廣告方案。
items.title_en: China AI-animation startup raises ¥3.6M angel round: AI cuts 2D-animation cost and cycle time
items.summary_en: Qiying Culture tackles 2D animation's high cost and long cycle with 'traditional pre-production + AI mid-stage generation', closing a ¥3.6M RMB angel round — validating AI-assisted creative production's commercial viability.
items.why_en: AI animation is commercially viable — consider pitching clients lower-cost animated ad options.

items.title: Publicis 第二季增長 4.8%，上調全年預測，新增 2300 職位
items.summary: Publicis 7月20日公布 Q2 有機增長 4.8%，CEO Arthur Sadoun 強調「我哋從來唔想成為一間 AI 公司」，強勁業績令其上調全年預測，並宣布新增逾 2300 個職位。
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例
items.why: 廣告業龍頭逆勢擴張人手，印證 AI 是輔助而非完全取代人力嘅方向。
items.title_en: Publicis grows 4.8% in Q2, raises full-year outlook, adds 2,300 jobs
items.summary_en: Publicis reported 4.8% Q2 organic growth on Jul 20; CEO Arthur Sadoun stressed 'we never wanted to be an AI company.' Strong results led it to raise its full-year outlook and announce 2,300+ new jobs.
items.why_en: The ad giant is expanding headcount against the trend — proof AI augments rather than fully replaces people.

items.title: 中國廣告市場達 780 億美元，增 4%——傳統 Agency 份額仍被蠶食
items.summary: 研究機構 Ebiquity 報告：中國廣告市場年增 4% 達 780 億美元，增長係有嘅。同時傳統 agency 佔整體廣告市場嘅份額比例持續流向品牌自建內部團隊及大型科技平台。
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例
items.why: Agency 要加快以 AI 驅動高效執行差異化，是保住市場份額嘅關鍵方向。
items.title_en: China's ad market hits US$78B, up 4% — but traditional agencies keep losing share
items.summary_en: Ebiquity reports China's ad market grew 4% to US$78B; the growth is real. Meanwhile traditional agencies' share keeps flowing to brands' in-house teams and big tech platforms.
items.why_en: Agencies must speed up AI-driven, differentiated execution — it's key to holding market share.

items.title: OpenAI 正式宣布進軍廣告市場，直接挑戰 Google 及 Meta
items.summary: AI Marketers 7月19日週報確認 OpenAI 正式宣布進軍廣告市場，將直接與 Google AI Mode 廣告及 Meta 廣告生態競爭，廣告業格局迎來新一輪衝擊。
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例
items.why: 廣告媒體生態出現新競爭者，Agency 要開始研究 OpenAI 廣告平台嘅入場方式。
items.title_en: OpenAI officially enters the ad market, taking on Google and Meta directly
items.summary_en: AI Marketers' Jul 19 weekly confirms OpenAI has officially announced entry into the ad market, set to compete directly with Google AI Mode ads and Meta's ad ecosystem — a fresh shock to the ad landscape.
items.why_en: A new competitor is entering ad media — agencies should study how to buy on OpenAI's ad platform.

items.title: TikTok 推出 Ads MCP Server：AI 代理可直接落 TikTok 廣告指令
items.summary: TikTok World 2026 推出 Ads MCP Server（MCP 即畀第三方 AI 工具完成指令嘅標準接口），讓 AI 代理可直接入 TikTok Ads Manager 落廣告指令、更新廣告、查看報告，實現廣告自動化。
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例
items.why: 廣告操作可透過 AI 代理自動化，慳重複性工作，提升廣告操作效率。
items.title_en: TikTok launches Ads MCP Server: AI agents can issue TikTok ad commands directly
items.summary_en: TikTok World 2026 launched an Ads MCP Server (MCP = a standard interface letting third-party AI tools execute commands), letting AI agents create/update ads and pull reports inside TikTok Ads Manager for ad automation.
items.why_en: Ad operations can be automated via AI agents — cutting repetitive work and lifting efficiency.

items.title: Meta 帳戶外活動追蹤新規：再行銷覆蓋擴大，Lookalike 受眾質素提升
items.summary: Meta 七月起撤銷用戶「帳戶外活動退出」選項，統一收歸「其他商家活動」設定，令廣告主再行銷受眾覆蓋面擴大，Lookalike（相似受眾）質素同時提升。
items.section: 行業影響 & 品牌案例
items.why: Meta 再行銷覆蓋面擴大，是優化客戶廣告受眾嘅直接機會，宜立即測試。
items.title_en: Meta's new off-account activity tracking: wider retargeting reach, better Lookalike quality
items.summary_en: From July Meta removed users' 'off-account activity opt-out', consolidating it under 'other businesses' activity' settings — widening advertisers' retargeting reach and improving Lookalike audience quality.
items.why_en: Wider Meta retargeting reach is a direct chance to optimize client ad audiences — worth testing now.

items.title: XHS 小紅書 2026 算法新邏輯：65% 內容被發現非來自流都而是搜尋
items.summary: WSD Social 報告指 XHS 2026 年算法重心轉向搜尋主導，65% 內容發現透過搜尋而非 Feed 流，優先收藏率（Save Rate）、語意相關性及真實互動，對品牌內容策略影響深遠。
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法
items.why: XHS 帖子標題及關鍵詞優化即刻可做，搜尋主導意味 SEO 邏輯是打法關鍵。
items.title_en: XHS (RED) 2026 algorithm shift: 65% of content discovery now comes from search, not the feed
items.summary_en: WSD Social reports XHS's 2026 algorithm has turned search-led: 65% of content discovery comes via search rather than the feed, prioritizing save rate, semantic relevance and genuine engagement — a big shift for brand content strategy.
items.why_en: Optimizing XHS titles and keywords is doable now — search-led means SEO logic is the key play.

items.title: TikTok 帶貨直播合規 Checklist：AI 配音已禁，真人聲音是唯一選擇
items.summary: TikTok Shopping LIVE 禁 AI 配音及預錄音頻新規已生效，品牌帶貨需安排真人主播即時解說。合規指引三大原則：真人聲音、真實展示、禁止誤導性說法。
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法
items.why: 即刻檢查 TikTok 帶貨 SOP，避免因用咗 AI 配音而被封號或下架廣告。
items.title_en: TikTok live-selling compliance checklist: AI voice is banned, human voice is the only option
items.summary_en: TikTok's Shopping LIVE ban on AI voiceovers and pre-recorded audio is now in effect; brands need real human hosts narrating live. Three principles: real voice, genuine demos, no misleading claims.
items.why_en: Check your TikTok live-selling SOP now to avoid bans or pulled ads from using AI voice.

items.title: WeChat Mini Program 接入 AI：開發者可申領 10 億 Token，實測 AI 指令功能
items.summary: 騰訊開放 WeChat AI 生態給 Mini Program 開發者，可申請 10 億 Token 開發積分，測試讓小微 AI 助手透過自然語言落指令完成 Mini Program 內任務（落單、預訂、查詢）。
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法
items.why: 品牌 WeChat Mini Program 可先申領試用，搶先部署 AI 指令功能吸引用戶。
items.title_en: WeChat Mini Programs get AI: developers can claim 1B tokens to test AI commands
items.summary_en: Tencent opened its WeChat AI ecosystem to Mini Program developers, who can claim 1B token dev credits to test letting the Xiaowei AI assistant complete in-Mini-Program tasks (order, book, query) by natural language.
items.why_en: Brand WeChat Mini Programs can claim credits and trial early — get ahead deploying AI commands to draw users.

items.title: Kling 3.0 Turbo 快速預覽用法：五步測試廣告影片概念，唔使等完整渲染
items.summary: Kling 3.0 Turbo 工作流：① 輸入文字或圖片 prompt ② 即生成 5–15 秒 720p 預覽 ③ 篩選最佳概念 ④ 正式渲染高清版 ⑤ 快速提交客戶確認，全程比傳統流程慳至少一半時間。
items.section: 即學技巧 & 玩法
items.why: 影片廣告概念測試時間大幅縮短，今日即可試用加速創意提案流程。
items.title_en: Kling 3.0 Turbo fast-preview workflow: test ad-video concepts in five steps, no full-render wait
items.summary_en: Kling 3.0 Turbo workflow: ① input a text or image prompt ② instantly generate a 5–15s 720p preview ③ shortlist the best concept ④ render the HD final ⑤ send for quick client sign-off — at least half the time of the old process.
items.why_en: Video-ad concept testing gets much faster — trial it today to speed up creative pitching.
